name: harness-engineering-audit
description: Audit repositories for OpenAI-style harness engineering and Codex/OMX readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Audit repos for agentic development readiness.
interface.longDescription: Scores AGENTS.md, Codex config, skills, MCP, hooks, rules, docs authority, validation truth, OMX workflow, and production readiness for AI-driven development.
defaultPrompt: Use Harness Engineering Audit to assess this repo for Codex/OMX readiness.
Run the harness engineering audit and produce an OMX handoff report.
